# my-skill

## 1. Overview

This skill generates comprehensive test suites for Python modules using pytest.

## 2. When to Use

Use this skill when:
- The user asks to write tests for a module
- Test coverage needs to be improved
- A bug fix requires a regression test

## 3. Steps

1. Analyse the module under test
2. Identify edge cases and happy paths
3. Generate pytest test functions
4. Verify tests pass
